name: KLCC Real Estate Investment Trust
summary: KLCC Real Estate Investment Trust (KLCC REIT) is a Malaysia-based real estate investment trust that focuses on prime commercial properties in Kuala Lumpur City Centre. The trust's portfolio includes iconic properties such as PETRONAS Twin Towers, Menara ExxonMobil, and Suria KLCC shopping mall. KLCC REIT aims to provide stable and sustainable returns to its unitholders through effective property management and strategic asset enhancement initiatives.
